steps.title: Apply the factoring from the given condition
Compute the target value
steps.content: Divide by $3$: $x-6 = -4$. That matches choice C — C is correct.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to match the computed result to the answer choices. The value or equation found above matches choice C, $-4$. The other choices do not satisfy the same condition from the question, so C is correct.
